name: Chocolate Cheesecake- Country Living Holidays
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces semisweet chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C). Crush the chocolate wafers in a food processor or plastic bag with a rolling pin. Add butter and process or knead into crumbs. Press into the bottom of an oiled 9-inch spring-form pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Stir together sugar and cornstarch. Beat into the cream cheese mixture.
3. Add eggs to the mixture one at a time, beating after each addition. Fold in vanilla extract, melted chocolate, and sour cream until well combined.
4. Turn the cheesecake mixture into the hot, crumb-lined pan. Return to oven. Bake until the center is nearly set when gently tapped (about 1 hour). Turn off the oven and let the cake sit for 1 hour longer.
5. Remove the pan from the oven; allow it to cool to room temperature. Cover without touching the surface of the cake. Place in the refrigerator overnight.
6. To serve, loosen the cake from the side of the pan with a spatula. Remove the side of the pan. Place the cake on a serving platter. Decorate with whipped cream if desired.
